## Description
Brief description of the changes made.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring

## Related Issue
Fixes #(issue number)

## Testing
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] All tests pass (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] Coverage maintained (don't reduce coverage)

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style (gofmt, go vet)
- [ ] Zero external dependencies added (stdlib only)
- [ ] Feature wired in engine.go (no dead code)
- [ ] Config-gated middleware (enabled: true/false)
- [ ] Port 0 used in tests (no hardcoded ports)
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated for user-facing changes
